description: Five notes on tiny pieces of vellum, ordering the addressee to hand over small sums or certain quantities of oil, soap, wood, vegetables, lemon, or sugar to bearers. All are signed by one Zakkai. Mentioned in Med Soc, III, A19. Information from Goitein's note card.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
